emails.subject: WTI trading simulation model - presentation
emails.body: WTI trading simulation model presentation John, I put together a presentation of the simulation model for WTI market maker for you. The P/L results are investigated by assuming different scenarios. The key variable is the number of trade per day, therefore is varied from 200 to 1000 trades. Scenarios are generated by different spreads, net open position allowed, and time period. Take a look what I have prepared, and let me know things you want to add or delete. If you have any questions, I will be happy to discuss with you. Zimin PS: this presentation is only for the open-close trading. I will produce exact the same sequence for the continuous trading (close-close) once you approve the content.

emails.body: John, I will be out today and Tuesday for helping MBA recruiting at Carnegie Mellon. We may meet on Wednesday. I will schedule time with Kim. Zimin John J Lavorato@ENRON 12/10/2000 11:10 AM
